name: kimi-dynamo-production-reference-corpus
acceptance_expectations: Artifacts must carry builtin workload and experiment provenance.
Reference lane must resolve to production_validated / production_comparable.
Comparison output must remain comparable within the same Kimi/Dynamo lane.
limitations: This corpus is synthetic reference data, not a live benchmark export.
It exists to pin the canonical production-lane JSON shape and comparison semantics in version control.
